description_long: This is a compact, two-tier open shelf unit with a minimalist design, featuring a light-colored wooden top and shelf supported by a simple, rectangular metal frame. The wood surfaces display a natural grain pattern, giving the piece a subtle, organic texture. The frame is constructed from slender, metallic legs that provide stability while maintaining an airy, unobtrusive appearance. The lower shelf is set back slightly from the top, creating a shadowed effect and additional storage space. There are no visible doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its open-access functionality. This type of shelving unit is suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, garages, or parks, where it can be used for temporary storage or display.
description: A minimalist, two-tier open shelf with light wood surfaces and a slim metal frame, designed for accessible storage or display. The open structure and natural wood grain make it visually light and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open access to both the top and lower shelves, with the metal frame visible on the sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the continuous metal frame along the sides.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open back and the alignment of the shelves within the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the shelf depth and frame structure.
